notes: Plant tea / medicinal / other-use split cleanup after v4.3.168.
Keeps ordinary culinary teas and flavoring uses food-valid while separating therapeutic, medicinal, emergency, resin/gum, bark/cambium, and other-use contexts.
Clarifies Birch sap as the normal edible use, Pine needle/tip tea as the broad food use, and separates broad pine nuts/resin/gum from normal edible routing.
No route-code or schema changes; existing fields now carry clearer food, medicinal/traditional, and other-use roles.
